semantic_description: Verifies binary_search_last: an upper-bound style while-loop binary search over a nondecreasing IntArray. The loop advances left when a[mid] <= target and lowers right otherwise; after convergence it checks left > 0 and a[left - 1] == target to return the last index whose value equals target, or returns -1 when the sorted array contains no target. The function only reads the input array and preserves IntArray::full(a, n, l). Boundary behavior includes n == 0, skipped final successful branch when left == 0, and returning -1 when all elements differ from target.
